name: TOBESTABLE
description: Anti-inflationary Solana token with 1024 decreasing mint rounds. 50% to minter, 50% to vault. The vault uses an on-chain Pyth oracle around $1: a hard ceiling that sells TOBE for SOL above $1, and a reserve-bounded floor that activates once TOBE first reaches $1, buying TOBE below $1 as far as its SOL reserve reaches. Permanent locked liquidity on Raydium (LP tokens burned). A disclosed, hard-capped team allocation of 8 free mint rounds (under 1% of 1024, same 50/50 split, no setter); beyond that the founder mints under the same rules as everyone. No SOL to the team from mints — the only team-linked revenue is a disclosed 50% share of ceiling-arbitrage proceeds (buy_from_vault), which only accrues when TOBE trades at or above $1. Built to be stable.

attributes.value: Pyth-based: hard $1 ceiling, reserve-bounded floor (active once TOBE reaches $1)
